title: Improve error messages when system image missing
body:
When inspecting an image index where the platform image for the current
architecture is missing, be clearer in the error message about what is
wrong.

comments.body: Whoops, that's me just being dense and not noticing that code was in image. I'll reopen in image first. Thanks for the previous pr link, will make sure I involve people.
No worries – and we _will_ need a Skopeo PR for the test update anyway.
